title: Prevent thread suspension DoS vulnerabilities
description: Thread suspension mechanisms in Java can be exploited to cause Denial of Service (DoS) attacks. Attackers may block critical threads, leading to application unresponsiveness or resource exhaustion. Always design thread management to avoid untrusted code or users being able to suspend or block essential threads.
recommendation: Avoid exposing thread suspension or blocking operations to untrusted input. Use proper synchronization and privilege checks to protect critical threads.

checks.message: Avoid using deprecated thread control methods that can be exploited for DoS attacks.
